normal_cases.name: Canonical `sisyphus` imports own the core runtime, MCP, evolution, and CLI surfaces.
Legacy `taskflow` imports continue to resolve to the same runtime implementations used by `sisyphus`.

edge_cases.name: Template resources, MCP schema/resources, and evolution helpers remain available after the ownership move.
Legacy `.taskflow.toml` fallback and compatibility-sensitive protocol identifiers remain intentionally unchanged.

exception_cases.name: Focused regressions across taskflow compatibility, MCP, evolution, event bus, and golden fixtures catch remaining package-boundary drift.

verification_methods.target: Canonical and legacy module paths resolve to the same final runtime boundary
